title: Cheesy & Fizzy
description: Adds cheese and some new drinks
body:
Adds 5 types of cheese(more types may come in future) and 8 soda flavors, also foods made with all of the cheese types and a few more drinks

🧀Flavors🥤

Cheese types: cheddar, mozzarella, emmental, gorgonzola, cottage cheese, parmesan
Soda flavors: Cola, citrus, orange, root beer, grape, cherry, mojito, cream
